text: Hello? Hello? Hello. Hi, this is Chelsea and I'm reaching out because we pulled up your Medicare profile and there's a note here showing your 2026 plan update hasn't been confirmed yet. We just need a quick confirmation from you so your coverage doesn't get interrupted. Just confirm for me. Do you have both part A and part B? You ain't pulled up my Medicare file, you must have pulled up somebody else's, so you got the wrong number, or you ain't pulled up my Medicare file.
